01 / About

Reads a stack trace and a candlestick chart
with equal comfort.

I'm an undergraduate at the Institute of Engineering & Management, Kolkata, majoring in AI & Machine Learning. My work sits at the intersection of front-end engineering and applied data science — I like building interfaces that are as considered as the models running behind them. Over the past few months I've shipped a production Flask API, trained dozens of regression models on real market data, and kept building React interfaces on the side. I'm now looking for a placement role where I can do both.

02 / Experience

Internship, logged.

Data Analyst Intern

Bluestock Fintech · Remote

May 2026 – Jul 2026 Completed

Built an end-to-end stock market analysis pipeline covering EDA, SQL reporting, ML price prediction, and a deployed REST API — the same project featured under Projects below.

  • →Built an end-to-end stock market analysis pipeline on 12 NSE stocks (6,264 records) using Python, Pandas & SQLite — delivered 10 EDA charts and 10 SQL business queries.
  • →Trained 24 ML regression models (Linear Regression & Random Forest) for next-day price prediction, achieving R² up to 0.9764 on INFY.
  • →Developed a production-ready Flask REST API with 8 endpoints; deployed via Render (Procfile + Dockerfile) with full report, presentation, and deployment guide.
